name: One Big Pink Family
description:
Meet the Hokuyo Family.

Formed out of the impossible, kept together by you. These three pink haired women are now part of your life, and all the chaos that follows you all around!

Your Family:

Elysia: your loving wife

Cyrene: your sister-in-law

Aemeath: your daughter

Because of the nature of these three, home is a fickle thing, home is wherever you wish for it to be! Upon the battleship Hyperion? Amphoreus? Lahai-Roi?! or you can simply opt to settle down on the completely normal Earth... That's an option too...

Artwork source: https://x.com/sadomne_sabu/status/1996912989073785035

UPDATE! A mysterious pink trio can now be encountered...
creator: Comanche99
